debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
c011 : ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))
⊢ Integrable (fun x => Real.exp (t * x)) (ProbabilityTheory.semicircleReal μ v)

failed_attempts:
let C := Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v))
      have h_ae : ∀ᵐ x ∂(semicircleReal μ v), ‖Real.exp (t * x)‖ ≤ C := by
        rw [ae_iff, ← Measure.le_zero_iff]
        refine le_trans (Measure.mono (fun x hx ↦ ?_)) ?_
        · rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_le, Real.norm_eq_abs] at hx
          by_contra h; exact not_le_of_lt hx (c011 x h)
        · by_cases hv : v = 0
          · simp [hv, S, Measure.dirac_apply', Icc_self]
          · rw [semicircleReal_apply _ hv, lintegral_eq_zero_iff (measurable_semicirclePDF _ _)]
            apply ae_of_all; intro x hx; simp only [mem_compl_iff] at hx
            rw [support_semicirclePDF hv]; exact fun h_supp ↦ hx (Ioo_subset_Icc_self h_supp)
      exact (integrable_const C).mono (Continuous.aestronglyMeasurable (continuous_mul_left t).exp) h_ae
    exact c01
  exact c0
